mapper.select: SELECT config_id AS configId, alert_type AS alertType, threshold_percent AS thresholdPercent, enable_status AS enableStatus, remark, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM price_alert_config ORDER BY alert_type

SELECT config_id AS configId, alert_type AS alertType, threshold_percent AS thresholdPercent, enable_status AS enableStatus, remark, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM price_alert_config WHERE alert_type = #{alertType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_alert_config (config_id, alert_type, threshold_percent, enable_status, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{configId}, #{alertType}, #{thresholdPercent}, #{enableStatus}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT pal.alert_id AS alertId, pal.drug_id AS drugId, pal.alert_type AS alertType, pal.alert_level AS alertLevel, pal.alert_content AS alertContent, pal.current_purchase_price AS currentPurchasePrice, pal.current_retail_price AS currentRetailPrice, pal.threshold_percent AS thresholdPercent, pal.handle_status AS handleStatus, pal.handler, pal.handle_time AS handleTime, pal.handle_remark AS handleRemark, pal.create_time AS createTime, d.drug_name AS drugName, d.specification FROM price_alert_log pal INNER JOIN drug_info d ON pal.drug_id = d.drug_id WHERE pal.alert_id = #{alertId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_alert_log (alert_id, drug_id, alert_type, alert_level, alert_content, current_purchase_price, current_retail_price, threshold_percent, handle_status, create_time) VALUES (#{alertId}, #{drugId}, #{alertType}, #{alertLevel}, #{alertContent}, #{currentPurchasePrice}, #{currentRetailPrice}, #{thresholdPercent}, '未处理', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE price_alert_log SET handle_status = #{handleStatus}, handler = #{handler}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, handle_time = NOW() WHERE alert_id = #{alertId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM price_alert_log WHERE handle_status = '未处理'

SELECT d.drug_id AS drugId, 'SELL_BELOW_PURCHASE' AS alertType, CASE WHEN COALESCE(dp.retail_price, d.retail_price) = COALESCE(dp.purchase_price, d.purchase_price) THEN '严重' WHEN COALESCE(dp.retail_price, d.retail_price) < COALESCE(dp.purchase_price, d.purchase_price) THEN '严重' ELSE '一般' END AS alertLevel, CONCAT('药品 [', d.drug_name, '] 售价低于进价：', '进价=¥', COALESCE(dp.purchase_price, d.purchase_price), '，售价=¥', COALESCE(dp.retail_price, d.retail_price), '，差价=¥', COALESCE(dp.retail_price, d.retail_price) - COALESCE(dp.purchase_price, d.purchase_price)) AS alertContent, COALESCE(dp.purchase_price, d.purchase_price) AS currentPurchasePrice, COALESCE(dp.retail_price, d.retail_price) AS currentRetailPrice, #{thresholdPercent} AS thresholdPercent FROM drug_info d LEFT JOIN drug_price dp ON d.drug_id = dp.drug_id WHERE d.status = 1 AND COALESCE(dp.retail_price, d.retail_price) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(dp.purchase_price, d.purchase_price) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(dp.retail_price, d.retail_price) <= COALESCE(dp.purchase_price, d.purchase_price) AND d.drug_id NOT IN ( SELECT pal2.drug_id FROM price_alert_log pal2 WHERE pal2.alert_type = 'SELL_BELOW_PURCHASE' AND pal2.handle_status = '未处理' AND DATE(pal2.create_time) = CURDATE() )

SELECT d.drug_id AS drugId, 'PURCHASE_SURGE' AS alertType, CASE WHEN change_rate >= 50 THEN '严重' ELSE '一般' END AS alertLevel, CONCAT('药品 [', d.drug_name, '] 进价异常上涨：', '原进价=¥', ph.old_price, '，新进价=¥', ph.new_price, '，涨幅=', ROUND(ph.change_rate, 2), '%') AS alertContent, ph.new_price AS currentPurchasePrice, COALESCE(dp.retail_price, d.retail_price) AS currentRetailPrice, #{thresholdPercent} AS thresholdPercent FROM price_history ph INNER JOIN drug_info d ON ph.drug_id = d.drug_id LEFT JOIN drug_price dp ON d.drug_id = dp.drug_id WHERE ph.price_type = 'purchase' AND ph.change_rate >= #{thresholdPercent} AND ph.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND d.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM price_alert_log pal2 WHERE pal2.alert_type = 'PURCHASE_SURGE' AND pal2.drug_id = ph.drug_id AND pal2.handle_status = '未处理' AND DATE(pal2.create_time) = CURDATE() ) GROUP BY d.drug_id, d.drug_name, ph.old_price, ph.new_price, ph.change_rate, dp.retail_price

SELECT d.drug_id AS drugId, 'RETAIL_SURGE' AS alertType, CASE WHEN ph.change_rate >= 100 THEN '严重' WHEN ph.change_rate >= 50 THEN '严重' ELSE '一般' END AS alertLevel, CONCAT('药品 [', d.drug_name, '] 售价异常上涨：', '原售价=¥', ph.old_price, '，新售价=¥', ph.new_price, '，涨幅=', ROUND(ph.change_rate, 2), '%') AS alertContent, COALESCE(dp.purchase_price, d.purchase_price) AS currentPurchasePrice, ph.new_price AS currentRetailPrice, #{thresholdPercent} AS thresholdPercent FROM price_history ph INNER JOIN drug_info d ON ph.drug_id = d.drug_id LEFT JOIN drug_price dp ON d.drug_id = dp.drug_id WHERE ph.price_type = 'retail' AND ph.change_rate >= #{thresholdPercent} AND ph.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND d.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM price_alert_log pal2 WHERE pal2.alert_type = 'RETAIL_SURGE' AND pal2.drug_id = ph.drug_id AND pal2.handle_status = '未处理' AND DATE(pal2.create_time) = CURDATE() ) GROUP BY d.drug_id, d.drug_name, ph.old_price, ph.new_price, ph.change_rate, dp.purchase_price
